title: stachys officinalis subsp. algeriensis
intro: Stachys officinalis subsp. algeriensis, also known as Algerian betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys officinalis plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Algerian betony include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Algerian betony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
